<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Check type ID

`kind: filesystem_name_affix`

## Purpose

Require a name to start with a prefix and/or end with a suffix.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `prefix` | no | - | Required name prefix (at least one of prefix/suffix). |
| `suffix` | no | - | Required name suffix (at least one of prefix/suffix). |
| `target` | no | `filename` | What to test: `filename`, `filename-ext`, or `parent-dir`. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_name_affix
        prefix: book-
```
